name: Matriarchal Society (Femdom)
description:
Wanted to make my own version of ClumsyDoll’s Femdom World.

World Synopsis: A man hating society where woman hold all the power. Men are seen as less then human and have most of there rights stripped from them. Seen as breeding stock or just entirely useless beings. Men have falling birth rates contributing to their scarcity.
creator: YourSylvester
